question: Is there any way to order a McDouble with no ketchup?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Is there any way to order a McDouble with no ketchup?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Would you like to proceed with the standard version?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Okay, I'll add the McDouble with standard ketchup. We don't have a ketchup-free version, so how about the Cheeseburger instead? It has one cheese slice and similar sauce options.
